subject: physics
question_text: A light ray travels from air into a medium of refractive index \(1.5\). If the speed of light in air is \(3 \times 10^8\,\text{m/s}\), what is the speed of light in the medium?
solution_text: The refractive index \(n = c/v\), where \(c\) is the speed of light in air and \(v\) is the speed of light in the medium. Thus, \(v = c/n = (3 \times 10^8)/1.5 = 2.0 \times 10^8\,\text{m/s}\).
